holdings.infoBox: ROAM is an equity ETF with a total of 349 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electro-Mechanics stock at 3.10%, United Microelectronics at 1.83%, SK hynix at 1.77%, ASPEED Technology at 1.49%, and MediaTek at 1.46%.

overview.description: The Hartford Multifactor Emerging Markets ETF (ROAM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a multifactor and quant-driven index of emerging market stocks aimed at reducing concentration risk prevalent in cap-weighted indexes. ROAM was launched on Feb 26, 2015 and is issued by The Hartford.
infoTable: Hartford Multi-factor Emerging Markets Equity Index
